personal.name: Alexeis Vladimir Carrillo Pinaya
personal.title: Software Architect & Senior Full-Stack Developer
personal.tagline: Event-driven architectures at scale (gRPC · MQTT · Kafka) with an edge in on-premise AI.
personal.summary: Systems Engineer, developer and solutions architect with over 15 years building software. I work at the intersection of solid backend engineering (NestJS, Quarkus, Kubernetes) and real-world AI integration: I design scalable, event-driven systems, build intelligent agents with LLMs, and automate complex processes with a mindset focused on the user, the data and strategic value. From Power BI dashboards to secure hybrid architectures for banking and government, I love solving big problems with elegant solutions. Always in beta: learning, connecting and building.

highlights.title: Distributed architecture
highlights.description: Design of event-driven microservices with gRPC, MQTT and Kafka for high-concurrency systems.

highlights.title: Technical leadership
highlights.description: Scrum Master and architecture reference: I set standards, mentor teams and drive end-to-end decisions.

highlights.title: On-premise AI
highlights.description: Integration of local LLMs (Ollama, Llama.cpp) with RAG and embeddings for automation without exposing sensitive data.

projects.name: Tu Municipio 24/7
projects.description: A Tax Administration Registry platform to check municipal debts and payments via bank QR. Event-driven architecture with gRPC and MQTT.

projects.name: Administrative Information System (SIA)
projects.description: An HR system for staff control, vacations and records, communicating between services via gRPC.

projects.name: Microservices + Kafka Ecosystem
projects.description: A microservices ecosystem with Spring Boot, Kafka, Avro and Schema Registry, with a shared library and email notifications.
